pr.title: Fix incorrectly named file from gmsinglebutton to gmcamera
pr.author: PsiLupan

summary: Renamed an assembly file reference in the gm subsystem from gmsinglebutton to gmcamera and updated obj_files.mk so the build uses $(BUILD_DIR)/asm/melee/gm/gmcamera.o instead of the incorrectly named gmsinglebutton.o. The PR body says the author had mixed up some references.

key_files.role: Renamed destination assembly file; diff reports 100% similarity from the previous gmsinglebutton.s name.
Old incorrectly named assembly file removed by rename.
Updated TEXT_O_FILES build list to reference gmcamera.o instead of gmsinglebutton.o.

what_changed: Renamed asm/melee/gm/gmsinglebutton.s to asm/melee/gm/gmcamera.s with 100% similarity, indicating a pure file-name correction rather than code changes.
Changed the TEXT_O_FILES entry in obj_files.mk from $(BUILD_DIR)/asm/melee/gm/gmsinglebutton.o to $(BUILD_DIR)/asm/melee/gm/gmcamera.o.
Preserved the surrounding object order near gm/gmtitle.o and text_5.o while correcting the object filename.
smart_moves: Kept the fix minimal: one rename and one build-manifest reference update.
Updated obj_files.mk in the same PR as the assembly file rename, avoiding a stale object path in the build list.
Used a semantic gm subsystem filename, gmcamera, rather than leaving a misleading gmsinglebutton label.
decomp_lessons: When renaming asm files, update the corresponding object path in obj_files.mk immediately; otherwise the build manifest can keep pointing at a non-existent or incorrectly named object.
Pure renames are valuable in decomp repositories because file names encode inferred module identity and guide future symbol migration into C.
If a module was misidentified, prefer a narrow correction that preserves object ordering and file contents unless there is evidence that code boundaries also changed.
naming_conventions: Game-mode assembly files under asm/melee/gm use gm-prefixed module names such as gmtitle and gmcamera.
The object path in obj_files.mk mirrors the asm source path under $(BUILD_DIR), e.g. asm/melee/gm/gmcamera.s corresponds to $(BUILD_DIR)/asm/melee/gm/gmcamera.o.
Avoid retaining placeholder or mistaken names such as gmsinglebutton when the module has been identified as gmcamera.
assembly_or_matching_tactics: The diff shows a 100% similarity rename, so the tactic was source-identity correction without perturbing assembly contents.
Preserving TEXT_O_FILES ordering while changing only the filename reduces risk of unintended link-order or matching changes.
follow_up_queries: Find later PRs that add headers or C sources for gmcamera.
Search for remaining references to gmsinglebutton to ensure the old mistaken name was fully removed.
Check whether gmcamera naming aligns with symbol names or map labels in the gm subsystem.
